offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in receiving updates on claim status changes cause missed deadlines. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of claim statuses through emails and phone calls.
problem: delays in receiving updates on claim status changes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters

try_it: Let users try real-time status monitoring and dashboard on 1-3 claims
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
